G698.strongs_def: an Areopagite or member of the court held on Mars' Hill

G670.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the middle voice of G5412 (φορτίζω);

G680.strongs_def: properly, to attach oneself to, i.e. to touch (in many implied relations)

G652.strongs_def: a delegate; specially, an ambassador of the Gospel; officially a commissioner of Christ ("apostle") (with miraculous powers)
G652.kjv_def: apostle, messenger, he that is sent

G609.strongs_def: to amputate; reflexively (by irony) to mutilate (the privy parts)

G687.derivation: a form of G686 (ἄρα), denoting an interrogation to which a negative answer is presumed

G631.derivation: middle voice from G575 (ἀπό) and (to squeeze, knead, smear);

G684.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G622 (ἀπόλλυμι);
G684.strongs_def: ruin or loss (physical, spiritual or eternal)
G684.kjv_def: damnable(-nation), destruction, die, perdition, X perish, pernicious ways, waste

G619.derivation: from a comparative of G575 (ἀπό) and (to enjoy);

G625.derivation: probably from the same as G624 (Ἀπολλωνία);

G627.kjv_def: answer (for self), clearing of self, defence

G618.strongs_def: to receive (specially, in full, or as a host); also to take aside

G601.strongs_def: to take off the cover, i.e. disclose

G635.strongs_def: to lead astray (figuratively); passively, to stray (from truth)

G691.strongs_def: to be idle, i.e. (figuratively) to delay

G681.strongs_def: properly, to fasten to, i.e. (specially) to set on fire

G677.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4350 (προσκόπτω);
G677.strongs_def: actively, inoffensive, i.e. not leading into sin; passively, faultless, i.e. not led into sin

G654.strongs_def: to turn away or back (literally or figuratively)

G633.strongs_def: to wash off (reflexively, one's own hands symbolically)

G642.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G3737 (ὀρφανός);
G642.strongs_def: to bereave wholly, i.e. (figuratively) separate (from intercourse)

G679.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4417 (πταίω);

G615.strongs_def: to kill outright; figuratively, to destroy

G646.derivation: feminine of the same as G647 (ἀποστάσιον);

G657.derivation: middle voice from G575 (ἀπό) and G5021 (τάσσω);
G657.strongs_def: literally, to say adieu (by departing or dismissing); figuratively, to renounce
G657.kjv_def: bid farewell, forsake, take leave, send away

G606.strongs_def: to be reserved; figuratively, to await

G675.strongs_def: (in the genitive, i.e. possessive case) of Appius, the name of a Roman

G665.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G5157 (τροπή);

G648.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G4721 (στέγη);

G600.strongs_def: to reconstitute (in health, home or organization)

G645.strongs_def: to drag forth, i.e. (literally) unsheathe (a sword), or relatively (with a degree of force implied) retire (personally or factiously)

G639.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G4198 (πορεύομαι);
G639.strongs_def: to have no way out, i.e. be at a loss (mentally)

G686.derivation: probably from G142 (αἴρω) (through the idea of drawing a conclusion);
G686.strongs_def: a particle denoting an inference more or less decisive (as follows)
G686.kjv_def: haply, (what) manner (of man), no doubt, perhaps, so be, then, therefore, truly, wherefore

G655.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G4767 (στυγνητός);

G624.derivation: from the pagan deity (i.e. the sun;
G624.strongs_def: from G622 (ἀπόλλυμι)); Apollonia, a place in Macedonia

G649.strongs_def: set apart, i.e. (by implication) to send out (properly, on a mission) literally or figuratively
G649.kjv_def: put in, send (away, forth, out), set (at liberty)

G692.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2041 (ἔργον);
G692.strongs_def: inactive, i.e. unemployed; (by implication) lazy, useless

G664.derivation: adverb from a derivative of a comparative of G575 (ἀπό) and (to cut);

G602.kjv_def: appearing, coming, lighten, manifestation, be revealed, revelation

G650.kjv_def: defraud, destitute, kept back by fraud

G678.derivation: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of a presumed compound of G4383 (πρόσωπον) and G2983 (λαμβάνω) (compare G4381 (προσωπολήπτης));
G678.strongs_def: in a way not accepting the person, i.e. impartially

G644.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G4639 (σκιά);

G671.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G5530 (χράομαι);
G671.strongs_def: the act of using up, i.e. consumption

G697.derivation: from (the name of the Greek deity of war) and a derivative of G4078 (πήγνυμι);
G697.strongs_def: rock of Ares, a place in Athens

G683.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the middle voice of or (to shove);
G683.strongs_def: to push off, figuratively, to reject
G683.kjv_def: cast away, put away (from), thrust away (from)

G659.kjv_def: cast off, lay apart (aside, down), put away (off)

G643.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G4632 (σκεῦος);

G685.strongs_def: properly, prayer (as lifted to Heaven), i.e. (by implication) imprecation

G632.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G3551 (νόμος);

G616.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G2949 (κῦμα);
G616.strongs_def: to breed forth, i.e. (by transference) to generate (figuratively)

G653.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and a (presumed) derivative of G4750 (στόμα);
G653.strongs_def: to speak off-hand (properly, dictate), i.e. to catechize (in an invidious manner)

G611.strongs_def: to conclude for oneself, i.e. (by implication) to respond; by Hebraism (compare H06030) to begin to speak (where an address is expected)

G647.derivation: neuter of a (presumed) adjective from a derivative of G868 (ἀφίστημι);

G626.derivation: middle voice from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G3056 (λόγος);
G626.strongs_def: to give an account (legal plea) of oneself, i.e. exculpate (self)
G626.kjv_def: answer (for self), make defence, excuse (self), speak for self

G676.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a comparative of G4314 (πρός) and (to go);

G629.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G3083 (λύτρον);
G629.strongs_def: (the act) ransom in full, i.e. (figuratively) riddance, or (specially) Christian salvation

G673.strongs_def: to rend apart; reflexively, to separate

G690.strongs_def: an Arab or native of Arabia

G628.strongs_def: to wash fully, i.e. (figuratively) have remitted (reflexively)

G610.derivation: from G611 (ἀποκρίνομαι) (in its original sense of judging);

G630.strongs_def: to free fully, i.e. (literally) relieve, release, dismiss (reflexively, depart), or (figuratively) let die, pardon or (specially) divorce
G630.kjv_def: (let) depart, dismiss, divorce, forgive, let go, loose, put (send) away, release, set at liberty

G622.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G3639 (ὄλεθρος);
G622.strongs_def: to destroy fully (reflexively, to perish, or lose), literally or figuratively

G620.strongs_def: to leave behind (passively, remain); by implication, to forsake

G613.strongs_def: to conceal away (i.e. fully); figuratively, to keep secret

G696.strongs_def: silver (the metal, in the articles or coin)

G694.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G696 (ἄργυρος);
G694.strongs_def: silvery, i.e. (by implication) cash; specially, a silverling (i.e. drachma or shekel)

G603.derivation: from a comparative of G575 (ἀπό) and a compound of (the head) and G1380 (δοκέω) (in the sense of watching);
